title: Arby
description: Fast data-driven surrogate modeling library for gravitational waves and related applications. Implements reduced-order models via greedy algorithms and empirical interpolation.

title: PiQC — Path-Integral Quantum Control
description: MATLAB and Python implementation of path-integral quantum control algorithms for open and closed quantum systems. Enables stochastic optimal control of Lindblad dynamics.

title: Gravitational Wave Surrogates via AutoML
description: Automated machine learning pipeline for constructing gravitational wave surrogate models. Explores automated model selection and hyperparameter tuning for scientific data.

title: D-Wave Annealer Calibration (LANL)
description: Julia and MATLAB software developed during the LANL Quantum Computing Summer School 2025 for calibration and benchmarking of the D-Wave quantum annealer.
